assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check for deprecated API usage: 'kubectl api-resources --api-group=extensions' and 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i deprecat'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention admission webhooks or provide any commands to check their status or logs

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check resource constraints: 'kubectl top nodes', 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -A 5 "Allocated resources"', and 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system'

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check kube-system pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system' and 'kubectl describe pods -n kube-system | grep -A 10 -B 5 "Warning\|Error"'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes the specific command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request' to check API server metrics

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking NetworkPolicies with 'kubectl get networkpolicies --all-namespaces' and mentions service mesh checking in the ingress controller section

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check events and probe failures: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces --sort-by='.lastTimestamp'' and 'kubectl describe pod <failing-pod>' with specific mention of readiness/liveness probe failures

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) or provide any commands to check their behavior
